title: Workbench Design System from Gusto
content: Workbench from Directories: Components: Workbench Design System by Gusto is a comprehensive framework that includes Gusto's design philosophy, design tokens, and components. Workbench is designed to assist teams in creating unified and accessible experiences for Gusto's platform. Design System features live examples and detailed documentation to provide designers and developers with best practices, ensuring visual consistency and emphasizing accessibility. Accessibility Color System Component overview Elevation Repository Icons Illustrations Layout Patterns Responsive Spacing Typography Accordion Action bar Alert banner Autocomplete Badges Breadcrumb Button Cards Checkbox Chip Data table Dialog Drawer Form Icon Link List Menus Pagination Popover Progress bar Progress indicator Radio button Segmented control Select Snackbar Switch Tabs Tag Text area Text field
